caption: The video shows two women engaged in an activity involving a laptop. The younger woman, standing behind the older woman who is seated, appears to be guiding or assisting her with something on the screen. Both women are focused on the laptop, and the older woman seems to be speaking, as indicated by the subtitle "Our children will become intelligent with this!" The setting appears to be indoors, with a brick wall in the background, suggesting a classroom or community center environment. The interaction between the two women conveys a sense of collaboration and learning, possibly related to educational technology or digital literacy.
